_comment: Skill-wide configuration for jstool. Every default behavior listed here can be overridden per invocation by a CLI flag. Set any cap to null to disable.

defaults._comment: Default modes. CLI flags always win: -f forces apply even if default_force_apply=false, -R reveals even if default_reveal=false.

output_limits._comment: Soft caps on view/find output to prevent context blowups. Override with -n / --max-tokens / --value-max. value_max_chars truncates only string VALUES in previews/diffs (never keys or paths). tokens_per_char is the rough ratio used to estimate tokens when no tokenizer is wired.

sensitive_keys._comment: Default-mask any string value whose path's last segment matches one of key_name_patterns (case-insensitive substring, punctuation-stripped). Use -R/--reveal to disable masking for one invocation.
